name: Twigsprout Tree
description: A tree often found in the wilds of Nod-Krai. It has a relatively thick trunk and fresh green canopy.\nIt is said that this tree and its close relatives are exceptionally hardy, with strong root systems that quickly grow deep into the soil to absorb nutrients. Its name comes from the fact that even the smallest twig from this tree planted in the ground can sprout and survive within a short period of time.
